business.name: Purcell Cabinetry & Furniture
business.tagline: Custom Cabinetry & Furniture Crafted for Dallas Homes

seo.title: Purcell Cabinetry & Furniture | Custom Carpenter in Dallas, TX
seo.description: Expert carpenter in Dallas, TX offering custom cabinetry, furniture, and millwork. Free consultations. Call (214) 328-8550.

hero.headline: Exceptional Cabinetry & Furniture, Handcrafted for Your Home
hero.subheadline: From custom kitchen cabinets to heirloom-quality furniture, we bring your vision to life with precision and care.

featureSections.title: Kitchen & Bath Cabinets Built to Last
featureSections.body: Our custom cabinetry transforms your kitchen or bath into a functional work of art. We use premium hardwoods and modern techniques to create cabinets that fit your space perfectly.
featureSections.cardBody: Shaker-style maple cabinets with custom glaze.

featureSections.title: Handcrafted Furniture That Tells a Story
featureSections.body: From dining tables to built-in bookshelves, each piece is designed and built to your specifications. We blend traditional joinery with contemporary design for timeless results.
featureSections.cardBody: Reclaimed pine with a hand-rubbed oil finish.

whyChooseUs.title: Custom Design Consultation
whyChooseUs.description: We meet you in your home to understand your style, needs, and budget, then create a design that fits perfectly.

whyChooseUs.title: Master Craftsmanship
whyChooseUs.description: With over 30 years of experience, our work is known for its precision, durability, and beauty.

whyChooseUs.title: Premium Materials
whyChooseUs.description: We source only the finest hardwoods, plywoods, and finishes to ensure your project stands the test of time.

whyChooseUs.title: On-Time Delivery
whyChooseUs.description: We respect your time and complete every project on schedule, with clear communication throughout.

testimonials.quote: Purcell transformed our outdated kitchen into a showpiece. The craftsmanship is outstanding, and the team was a pleasure to work with.
testimonials.author: Jennifer L.

testimonials.quote: We commissioned a custom dining table and it exceeded our expectations. It's the centerpiece of our home now.
testimonials.author: Mark T.

testimonials.quote: Professional, punctual, and incredibly talented. Our built-in bookshelves are flawless.
testimonials.author: Patricia G.

cta.headline: Ready to Start Your Project?
cta.subheadline: Contact us today for a free consultation and estimate.

servicesPage.intro: At Purcell Cabinetry & Furniture, we specialize in custom woodwork for every room in your home. From concept to completion, we deliver exceptional quality and personalized service.

services.title: Custom Kitchen Cabinetry
services.shortDescription: Beautiful, functional cabinets designed for your cooking and gathering needs.
services.longDescription: Our custom kitchen cabinets are built to your exact specifications, maximizing storage and style. We offer a wide range of door styles, wood species, and finishes to complement any decor. Each cabinet is handcrafted with dovetail drawers, soft-close hardware, and sturdy construction that lasts for decades.
benefits: Choice of premium hardwoods and finishes

process.title: Design Consultation
process.description: We visit your home, take measurements, and discuss your needs, style preferences, and budget.

process.title: Custom Design & Approval
process.description: We create detailed drawings and 3D renderings for your approval before building begins.

process.title: Installation & Finish
process.description: Our team installs your cabinets with precision, ensuring a perfect fit and flawless finish.

faqs.question: How long does a custom kitchen cabinet project take?
faqs.answer: Typically 4-6 weeks from design approval to installation, depending on complexity.

faqs.question: Do you offer refacing or just new cabinets?
faqs.answer: We specialize in new custom cabinets, but we can also reface existing boxes if they are in good condition.

services.title: Custom Bathroom Vanities
services.shortDescription: Elegant vanities that combine style with practical storage.
services.longDescription: Transform your bathroom with a custom vanity that fits your space perfectly. We craft vanities in any size, style, and finish, with features like soft-close drawers, integrated sinks, and matching mirrors. Whether you prefer modern or traditional, we bring your vision to life.
benefits: Perfect fit for odd-sized or small bathrooms
Custom storage for toiletries and linens
Adds a spa-like feel to your home

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We discuss your bathroom layout, storage needs, and design preferences.

process.title: Design & Material Selection
process.description: We create a custom design and help you choose wood, finish, and hardware.

process.title: Fabrication & Installation
process.description: We build your vanity in our shop and install it with care.

faqs.question: Can you match an existing style or finish?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can match most stains and paints to coordinate with your existing decor.

faqs.question: Do you install the countertop as well?
faqs.answer: We install the vanity cabinet; countertop installation can be arranged with our preferred partners.

services.title: Custom Furniture
services.shortDescription: One-of-a-kind tables, beds, shelves, and more.
services.longDescription: From heirloom dining tables to custom built-in units, our furniture is designed to fit your space and style. We use traditional joinery and premium materials to create pieces that are both beautiful and functional. Each item is built to order and finished by hand.
benefits: Unique pieces that reflect your personality
Built to last with solid wood construction

process.title: Idea & Design
process.description: Share your inspiration, sketches, or photos. We refine the design together.

process.title: Wood Selection & Build
process.description: We select the best lumber and handcraft your piece using time-honored techniques.

process.title: Finishing & Delivery
process.description: We apply your chosen finish and deliver your furniture, often with white-glove service.

faqs.question: What types of wood do you use?
faqs.answer: We work with oak, maple, cherry, walnut, and reclaimed woods, among others.

faqs.question: Can you replicate a piece from a photo?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We can recreate or adapt any design to your specifications.

services.title: Custom Millwork & Built-Ins
services.shortDescription: Architectural details and storage solutions that enhance your home.
services.longDescription: Add character and function to your home with custom millwork: crown molding, wainscoting, built-in bookcases, window seats, and more. Our millwork is precision-milled and installed seamlessly, elevating the look of any room.

process.title: Site Assessment
process.description: We measure and assess the space, discussing your vision and requirements.

process.title: Design & Detailing
process.description: We create detailed plans for the millwork, including profiles and dimensions.

process.title: Installation
process.description: Our team installs the millwork with precision, ensuring a perfect fit and finish.

faqs.question: Can you match existing trim profiles?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can replicate most trim styles to blend with your home's architecture.

faqs.question: Do you paint or stain the millwork?
faqs.answer: We can prime and paint, or apply stain and clear coat, depending on your preference.

about.headline: Bringing Dallas Homes to Life Since 1990
about.mission: To create beautiful, functional woodwork that enhances the way people live, using time-honored craftsmanship and personalized service.
story: Purcell Cabinetry & Furniture was founded with a simple mission: to build custom woodwork that stands the test of time. What started as a one-man shop has grown into a trusted name in Dallas, known for meticulous attention to detail and a passion for quality. Every project, from a single cabinet to a full home renovation, receives the same dedication and care.

Over three decades, we've honed our skills and expanded our capabilities, but our core values remain unchanged. We believe in using the best materials, respecting our clients' vision, and delivering on our promises. Whether it's a modern kitchen or a traditional library, we take pride in creating pieces that our clients love for years to come.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We never cut corners. Every joint, finish, and detail meets our high standards.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We are honest about timelines, costs, and what we can achieve.

coreValues.title: Collaboration
coreValues.description: Your input is vital. We work closely with you at every stage.

coreValues.title: Craftsmanship
coreValues.description: We honor the tradition of fine woodworking while embracing modern techniques.

contact.headline: Let's Build Something Beautiful Together
contact.subheadline: Contact us for a free consultation and estimate.
